configuration: tandem 41-stage + 38-stage = 79 stages in series per unit
speed_note: fixed 60 Hz (no VFD); nameplate 3570 RPM, field performs on 3500-normalized curve

head_per_stage_poly.form: head_ft_per_stage = c3*Q^3 + c2*Q^2 + c1*Q + c0, Q in BPD per pump, valid 0-21000

bhp_per_stage_poly.form: bhp_per_stage = c3*Q^3 + c2*Q^2 + c1*Q + c0, Q in BPD per pump

compute: dP_psi = head_per_stage(Q) * n_stages * SG / 2.31; discharge = suction_psi + dP_psi
parallel: all 3 in parallel: same dP, flows add -> per_pump_flow = total_flow / 3
source: fit of 2012 Borets section tests WO13579(38stg)/WO13580(41stg) @3500RPM, per stage
validated: matches S-Pad SCADA within ~1% (e.g. 30,694 BPD total -> ~3460 psi discharge)
